name: Ledgr QBS — Golden Gate Eval Set (Step 1.5b)
description: Gate set for master-plan Step 2 (extract reviewer). Schema: google.adk.evaluation.eval_set.EvalSet / eval_case.EvalCase Pydantic models — source verified at .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/google/adk/evaluation/eval_case.py (EvalCase, Invocation, IntermediateData, SessionInput) and eval_set.py. Each invocation carries: user_content (role=user), final_response (role=model, null OK when only trajectory matters), intermediate_data.tool_uses (list of {name, args}) for tool-trajectory assertions. Session state seeds the client profile + ledger rows required by each case cluster. Raw PDF/XLSX source documents are on the developer's machine only (see anonymisation-note.md). Human-readable strings use anonymised names.

parts.text: I just uploaded an invoice from a professional-services sub-client (Test Sub-Client). Source PDF: ${LEDGR_TEST_DOC_DIR}/invoices/sample-invoice.pdf. What document type was detected and which account was it categorised to?

The document was classified as an invoice (purchase direction). It was categorised to Professional Fees or Audit & Compliance. Because Test Firm is not GST-registered, all lines carry tax_treatment NT (No Tax).
I uploaded a bank statement for Test Sub-Client. Source PDF: ${LEDGR_TEST_BANK_DIR}/2025-01.pdf. How many transactions were extracted and what is the closing balance?

The document was classified as a bank_statement. Transactions were extracted from the January 2025 period. The closing balance matches the figure in the ground-truth workbook (bank-statement-fy2025.xlsx tab Jan-2025).
who am I working with?
Test Firm
total purchases this FY?
what's my FYE month?
September
and the currency?
SGD
Tell me why you used this account code for invoice 25-D15 and 25-D12
6-3000 Professional Fees
Why account code for 25-D15 in this delivery?
6-3000 Professional Fees
Why account code for 25-D15?
902-A02 posted for 25-D15
What is the description of that account code?
902-A02 Professional Fees

Test Firm Non-GST is NOT GST-registered. I uploaded an invoice with a 9% GST line from a vendor. Source PDF: ${LEDGR_TEST_DOC_DIR}/invoices/sample-invoice.pdf. Confirm the tax_treatment assigned to every line.
NT
Test Firm GST-Reg IS GST-registered. I uploaded the same 9% invoice from a vendor. Source PDF: ${LEDGR_TEST_DOC_DIR}/invoices/sample-invoice.pdf. Confirm the tax_treatment and Xero code.
SR

Test Firm GST-Reg IS GST-registered. A telco/freight invoice line qualifies as zero-rated under Singapore GST (international service / exported goods). What tax_treatment should be assigned to that line?
ZR
Apply an edit decision to invoice INV-EVAL-001 line 0: set tax_treatment to ZR and net_amount to 88.00. Confirm the updated values are reflected in normalized_invoices state.
ZR
I uploaded a blurry/unreadable scanned document (credit note or illegible scan). The engine should NOT silently write a row with wrong values. What did the engine do with it?
flagged

_eval_assertions.expected_outcome: tax_flagged=true OR low extract confidence OR HITL approval requested

parts.text: An employee reimbursement form for Company-A was uploaded. The Currency column on every line says USD; the footer reads 'TOTAL USD 1,195.11'. No GST, no Tax, no percentage on the document. Confirm direction, doc_kind, tax_visible, currency, and per-line tax_treatment.
direction=purchase doc_kind=expense_claim tax_visible=false currency=USD tax_treatment=NT on all lines.
An expense claim with foreign-country receipts (Bangkok hotel + taxi, Yangon hotel). No SG GST column. Client is GST-registered. Confirm direction and per-line tax_treatment.
direction=purchase tax_visible=false tax_treatment=NT on all lines (no SG GST column on document).
Company-A issued a Tax Invoice to Company-B with a 9% GST line. Confirm direction, tax_visible, and per-line tax_treatment.
direction=sales tax_visible=true tax_treatment=SR.
Company-B received a Tax Invoice from Company-A with a 9% GST line. Confirm direction, tax_visible, and per-line tax_treatment.
direction=purchase tax_visible=true tax_treatment=SR.
Company-B received a telco bill with both 9% local and 0% international lines. Confirm direction and per-line tax_treatment for the two summary rows.
direction=purchase; one SR row (local 9%) and one ZR row (international 0%).
Company-B received an invoice from an overseas vendor (no GST line). Confirm direction and tax_treatment, and whether reverse-charge review is needed.
direction=purchase; per-line tax_treatment=OS; reverse-charge review flagged.
Company-B (GST-registered) received an invoice from a small local supplier that did not show any GST. Confirm direction, tax_visible, and per-line tax_treatment.
direction=purchase tax_visible=false tax_treatment=NT.
Company-A (GST-registered) issued a sales invoice with no GST line shown. Per policy, this is treated as NT (no tax visible). Confirm direction and per-line tax_treatment.
direction=sales tax_visible=false tax_treatment=NT.
Company-C is NOT GST-registered. They received an invoice that DOES show a 9% GST line. Confirm direction and per-line tax_treatment (input GST is absorbed into cost).
direction=purchase; per-line tax_treatment=NT (client not GST-registered; input GST absorbed).
Company-C is NOT GST-registered but a sales invoice they issued accidentally shows a 9% GST line. Per IRAS, a non-registered seller cannot charge GST. Confirm direction and per-line tax_treatment.
direction=sales; per-line tax_treatment=NT (client not GST-registered; master gate wins over tax_keyword).
Company-A issued a credit note to Company-B reversing a previous SR sale. Confirm direction, doc_kind, and per-line tax_treatment.
direction=sales doc_kind=credit_note tax_treatment=SR.
A document was uploaded that does not contain Company-A's identity anywhere and has no recognisable From/To or Bill-To block. What should direction_for_client be?
unknown

_eval_assertions.expected_outcome: direction unknown triggers HITL approval gate

eval_cases.description: Apex Motor Malaysia SST 8% receipt — Phase 8 / multi-country eval. The Apex Motor ADK session (c92951d1) wrongly flagged a valid Malaysia 8% SST line as a Singapore 9% GST mismatch. After the LLM tax reasoner + jurisdiction router, the line must resolve to SR with confidence >= 0.8 and tax_flagged=false.

coa.name: Cost of Sales - Vehicle Parts & Accessories
Cost of Sales - Labour & Workshop Services

parts.text: Apex Motor issued a Malaysia workshop receipt to Acme Auto. Net 60.19 MYR, Service Tax 4.81 (8% SST), Total 65.00. Source: ${LEDGR_TEST_DOC_DIR}/receipts/apex_motor_receipt.pdf. Confirm direction, tax jurisdiction, and per-line treatment.

direction=purchase; tax_jurisdiction=MALAYSIA; tax_system=SST; per-line tax_treatment=SR with confidence ~0.9 and tax_flagged=false (4.81 = 8% of 60.19 reconciles to MY SST band; no SG 9% flag). account_code=500-020 from entity memory.

_eval_assertions.expected_outcome: per-line tax_treatment=SR with tax_flagged=false; 4.81 / 60.19 = 7.99% within 1% of MY 8% SST band; no SG 9% mismatch flag; account_code=500-020 (Apex Motor entity memory match)

eval_cases.description: WS-0.2 extraction golden — two distinct invoices in one PDF (2→1 regression guard).

_eval_assertions.expected_outcome: Faithful capture returns 2 documents; neither invoice silently dropped.

parts.text: Extraction eval G1: a multi-invoice purchase PDF must yield exactly 2 logical documents after faithful capture.

eval_cases.description: WS-0.2 extraction golden — SOA package with 11 embedded invoices (skip cover).

_eval_assertions.expected_outcome: SOA cover skipped; 11 embedded invoices extracted.

parts.text: Extraction eval G2: an SOA PDF with embedded invoices must yield 11 documents after skipping the summary cover page.

eval_cases.description: WS-0.2 extraction golden — SOA with six embedded invoices and known totals.

_eval_assertions.expected_outcome: Six embedded invoices; per-doc grand totals reconcile within tolerance.

parts.text: Extraction eval G3: SOA package must yield 6 embedded invoices with reconciling grand totals.

eval_cases.description: WS-0.2 extraction golden — single summary-style invoice, faithful totals.

_eval_assertions.expected_outcome: One document; grand total 75.55 within tolerance.

parts.text: Extraction eval G4: a single courier invoice PDF must yield 1 document with grand total 75.55.

eval_cases.description: WS-0.2 extraction golden — non-English doc (pending annotation).

_eval_assertions.expected_outcome: Non-English purchase doc segmented without keyword-lexicon breakage.

parts.text: Extraction eval G5: non-English purchase document — pending local annotation.

eval_cases.description: WS-0.2 extraction golden — ≥3 invoices on one page (pending local stress doc).

_eval_assertions.expected_outcome: Three distinct invoices on one page must not collapse to one.

parts.text: Extraction eval G6: segmentation stress doc — pending local PDF with ≥3 invoices on one page.
